meaning: n.同种疗法医师,顺势医疗论者
examples: The homeopath will test various strengths of remedies on the patient.
I took her to a homeopath, who started by taking a very long and detailed case history.
So I decided instead to become a social homeopath, a pro-activist, and to investigate the root cause of these symptoms.
Randi has recently offered one million dollars to any homeopath that can prove scientifically that homeopathy works.
The manufacturer then dilutes it to 200C, which in homeopath-speak means that 1 gram of extract is diluted to one part in 10400.
